title: Adaptive notification hold based on queue depth
description: Scale notification display time from 30s down to 10s based on queue depth, with 10s minimum.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented adaptive notification hold: hold_seconds now linearly scales from 30s at queued_after=0 to 10s at queued_after>=10, with 10s minimum. Tests passing (66). Clock restarted with patch.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Applying new hold-duration curve: 30s at depth 0, linearly down to 5s at depth 20, clamped to 5s minimum beyond depth 20.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented adaptive hold update: min_seconds=5.0 and depth_for_minimum=20. New curve: 30s at depth 0, 17.5s at depth 10, 5s at depth >=20. Updated unit tests and verified with pytest (-k adaptive_notice_seconds).
